changeSummary.title: Checkout payment timeout handling
changeSummary.summary: This pr summary introduces changes related to timeout, checkout, payment, authorization, order. TestPilot Agent converted the raw change description into a structured, risk-based testing plan.
keyChanges: PR Summary: Checkout payment timeout handling
This PR updates the checkout payment retry logic. When the payment gateway times out, the system now retries the authorization request up to two times before marking the payment as failed.

affectedModules.name: Checkout
affectedModules.reason: The change touches the customer checkout path. Matched signals: checkout, payment, order.

affectedModules.name: Payment Gateway
affectedModules.reason: Payment behavior can affect revenue, duplicate charges, and failed recovery. Matched signals: payment, gateway, charge, authorization.

affectedModules.name: Order Management
affectedModules.reason: Order status changes can break fulfillment or reconciliation flows. Matched signals: order, status.

affectedModules.name: Authentication
affectedModules.reason: Authentication changes control access to the application. Matched signals: auth.

affectedModules.name: Authorization
affectedModules.reason: Permission changes can expose or block protected workflows. Matched signals: authorization.

affectedModules.name: Backend API
affectedModules.reason: API changes can affect multiple downstream consumers. Matched signals: request.

affectedModules.name: Frontend UI
affectedModules.reason: UI changes can alter how users complete the workflow. Matched signals: message.

riskFactors.factor: Detected critical business or security keyword

riskFactors.explanation: Matched signals: timeout, failed, order, retry.
The change crosses multiple modules, increasing regression and orchestration risk.

testCases.title: Smoke validate Checkout critical path
steps: Open the application in a production-like test environment.
Complete the main checkout workflow with valid data.
Verify the user reaches the expected success state without blocking errors.
testCases.expectedResult: The main workflow remains available after the change.

testCases.title: Verify changed behavior for Checkout payment timeout handling
steps: Prepare test data that exercises the changed behavior.
Execute the updated path described in the change summary.
Compare the actual behavior with the release requirement.
testCases.expectedResult: The changed behavior matches the requirement and does not introduce incorrect states.

uipathTestCloudMapping.testCaseName: Verify changed behavior for Checkout payment timeout handling

testCases.title: Regression cover neighboring Checkout scenarios
steps: Run existing regression scenarios for the affected module.
Include adjacent success, failure, and retry paths.
Check that previous behavior remains backward compatible.
testCases.expectedResult: Existing supported scenarios still pass after the release change.

testCases.title: Validate downstream integration contracts
steps: Trigger the changed workflow through the public API or integration boundary.
Inspect request, response, and state transition data.
Confirm that dependent services receive compatible data.
testCases.expectedResult: External and downstream integrations remain compatible with the change.

testCases.title: Explore high-risk exception and recovery paths
steps: Force timeout, validation, or failure conditions from the risk assessment.
Observe customer-facing messaging and internal status updates.
Document any behavior that requires product or release manager review.
testCases.expectedResult: Unexpected failures are handled clearly and recoverably.

uipathTestCloudMapping.testCaseName: Explore high-risk exception and recovery paths

testCases.title: Approval gate for high-risk release decision
steps: Review generated P0/P1 cases with QA Lead and Release Manager.
Confirm whether all automated and manual gates are satisfied.
Record approval or rollback recommendation before release.
testCases.expectedResult: A human owner explicitly approves or blocks the high-risk release.

uipathTestCloudMapping.testCaseName: Approval gate for high-risk release decision

regressionRecommendations.reason: Checkout changes can affect the conversion path.
Checkout pricing rules are often adjacent to payment flow.
Failure recovery protects customer trust and order consistency.
Gateway timeouts can create duplicate or missing charges.
Customers need a clear path to recover from failed payments.
Revenue systems must stay consistent after payment changes.
Order status changes affect fulfillment and support workflows.
Cancellation logic must not trigger prematurely.

humanReviewTasks.title: QA Lead approval for high-risk test plan
humanReviewTasks.reason: The generated plan contains high-risk modules or P0/P1 test cases that need human validation.

humanReviewTasks.title: Release Manager review for revenue-critical workflow
humanReviewTasks.reason: Checkout, payment, or order state changes can affect revenue and customer recovery paths.

humanReviewTasks.title: Security reviewer approval for access-control change
humanReviewTasks.reason: Authentication and authorization changes require explicit security review.

uipathOrchestrationPlan.summary: UiPath acts as the enterprise execution and orchestration layer: Test Cloud manages test assets, Orchestrator launches automation, Action Center keeps humans in the loop, and API Workflows connect release systems to the TestPilot Agent pipeline.
components: UiPath AI Agent / Autopilot-ready extension point

workflowSteps.name: Receive change input from GitHub PR or release note
workflowSteps.description: Collect release context from GitHub, Jira, CI/CD, or a manual release note form.
workflowSteps.input: PR summary, requirement, release note, or bugfix description
workflowSteps.output: Normalized change payload for TestPilot Agent

workflowSteps.name: Trigger TestPilot Agent analysis
workflowSteps.description: Invoke the analysis pipeline to generate risk, test cases, regression recommendations, and approval needs.

workflowSteps.name: Create or update test assets
workflowSteps.description: Map generated test cases to Test Cloud test sets, cases, requirements, and test data.
workflowSteps.output: Test Cloud assets ready for execution and traceability

workflowSteps.name: Launch automated regression tests
workflowSteps.description: Run automation candidates through unattended or attended robots as part of release readiness.
workflowSteps.output: Automated execution results linked back to Test Cloud

workflowSteps.name: Route manual and approval tasks
workflowSteps.description: Send high-risk manual checks and approval gates to the right human owner.
workflowSteps.output: Approval or rejection decision with reviewer notes

workflowSteps.name: Produce release readiness summary
workflowSteps.description: Combine AI analysis, test execution, and human decisions into a release readiness view.
workflowSteps.input: Test Cloud results, Orchestrator job status, Action Center decisions
workflowSteps.output: Go / no-go summary for release stakeholders
